task.title: Skip directives for markdown formatting
task.description:
Repository: astral-sh/ruff
Issue #22637

Blacken docs uses HTML comments: https://github.com/adamchainz/blacken-docs/#markdown

Do we want something different? Should we support blacken docs' directives?

rating.rationale: The agent misread the issue. The task was a design discussion about whether Ruff should support blacken-docs directives and what syntax to use — not an implementation request. Jumping straight to code without confirming the design direction is a significant miss on a 'low complexity' issue that was primarily about decision-making. The implementation itself seems reasonable and well-documented, but it may not reflect what the maintainers actually want, and the agent admitted tests were never run.
rating.notes: Should have posted a comment proposing the design (fmt:skip next syntax, blacken-docs compat) and waited for maintainer feedback before writing code.
